text: I can't believe this! I tried to change the email associated with my account because I lost access to it, but it just won't let me! It says I have to verify my current email, but I can't use it! What do I do?

Hey, so I was just wondering, like, if there’s gonna be an easier way to sync my files across devices? I mean, it’s kinda crazy I have to do all this extra stuff just to get my docs on my phone, right? Also, any chance you’re gonna make it work for Linux or something? That’d be awesome.

I am writing to formally request a refund for the recent transaction on my account. I had intended to subscribe to the monthly plan, but my account was erroneously charged for the annual fee instead. This oversight has caused significant confusion, and I would appreciate your prompt attention to rectifying this matter. Thank you.

I’ve been trying to resolve this issue with my order for weeks now, and honestly, it’s like talking to a brick wall! I received the wrong item, and every time I reach out, I get some generic response that doesn't even address my problem. It’s so frustrating, I just want someone to actually listen and help me out with this mess!
so my order was wrong, and like, i tried to call but no one pick up? kinda mad.
